creator: USN, Army Rangers, et al
description: If you are able and over the age of 18 in the US, you are a member of the Constitutional (Part II) Militia. Here are films covering the most basic aspects of your education as armed citizens. Download all 32 of them, burn them to disc, and share them with other members. Do your part to help safeguard your neighbors, your community, and the US Constitution. Topics deal with basic marksmanship, tactical shooting skills, communication, movement of formations and squads, fields of fire; making and breaking enemy contact, sniper skills and camouflage, room clearing, and basic rifle maintenance.
